name: persistent-sage
description: Persistent Sage — local-first AI companion desktop app (Tauri + React)

scripts.msix:pack: npm run build && npm run tauri -- build --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.store.conf.json && npm run msix:assets && pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force msix-dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force src-tauri/target/release/persistent-sage.exe msix-dist/; winapp pack ./msix-dist --manifest Package.appxmanifest --output PersistentSage_1.0.0.0_x64.msix"
scripts.build:windows-installer: npm run build && tauri build -- --bundles nsis
